programmes.show_description: (2017) Action-packed western with Bill Pullman, Peter Fonda and Jim Caviezel. Loyalty and friendship are tested when an ageing gunslinger sets out to avenge his murdered friend.
(2016) Tense western starring Chad Michael Murray and Luke Wilson. A pastor's family home provides the perfect hideout for three violent fugitives. A long night of cat and mouse games beckons...
Witness the U.S. Coastguard at work as they battle the elements to perform daring sea rescues and save the lives of those in danger.

programmes.show_name: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land and Sea
programmes.show_description: With access to the UK's Maritime Coastguard Agency and Mountain Rescue Teams, follow the extraordinary men and women who put their own lives at risk to save members of the public 24/7.

(2020) Psychological thriller with Alex McKenna. A woman gets engaged to a man with a young daughter, but their happiness is threatened by the girl's biological mother, who resorts to deadly measures.

(2017) Baby-napping thriller with Kaitlyn Black. After his wife dies in a car crash and their newborn disappears, Brian comes to a shocking realisation - that someone they know would kill for a baby..
(2021) Thriller with Brittany Underwood. On her wedding day, Leah is kidnapped by her fiancé's ex-girlfriend. But is it obsession, or a desperate attempt to protect her from a hidden danger?
(2021) Tense psychological thriller with Annika Foster. A woman falls for a handsome firefighter who saves her life, but soon discovers that his overprotective nature can get obsessive - and deadly.

(2012) Thriller with Rhona Mitra. Still haunted by a failed negotiation, a psychologist is thrust back into high-stakes action when her sister is taken hostage, forcing her to face her greatest fears.
(2019) Tense thriller starring Kristina Klebe. A recently widowed woman grows suspicious of her insular son's new friend. Could his seemingly strange obsession with her turn sinister?
(2018) Tense thriller starring Rosslyn Luke. Happy to be reunited at first, a woman quickly realises her former best friend has sinister plans to hold her and her family hostage.
(2022) Tense thriller with Randy Couture. After he's sabotaged by those closest to him during a bullet-ridden heist, a brilliant thief manages to survive - and vows to kill everyone who betrayed him.
Former British secret agent Harry Palmer is dropped into the Russian criminal underworld when he receives a job to recover a consignment of stolen plutonium. Stars Michael Caine, Jason Connery (1996)

(2019) Cradle-robbing thriller with Clare Kramer. Jessica is shocked when her daughter starts dating an older man. But that soon turns to terror when she discovers her lethal connection to him...

(2020) Twist-laden thriller with Karynn Moore. When her wealthy estranged sister dies, Carly is shocked to be named guardian of her daughter. But someone's plans didn't include a long-lost relative...
(2020) Thriller starring Lindsay Hartley. Two families are thrown into crisis when they discover their daughters were switched at birth - but nothing will stop one mother keeping what's hers...
A group of scientists need to prevent the world from entering a new ice age. Starring Jeff Fahey and Erika Eleniak (2006).
(2015) Action with Mark Lutz. When an asteroid threatens to obliterate Earth, a discredited astrophysicist is humanity's last hope. Armed with cutting-edge tech, can he prevent a global disaster?
(2015) Sci-Fi action with Mike Dopud. A fractured family is caught up in a lethal lightning storm. Amidst the terror and destruction, can they find a way to unite and survive?
When the pilot of a passenger plane is killed by a rogue solar flare, one of the passengers has to step up and try to land the plane.
A former US Federal Officer has to come out of Witness Protection to stop him and his daughter from being the targets of deadly assassins. Starring Scott Adkins and Wade Barrett (2016).
A CIA agent has to stop Islamic terrorists from teaming up with Mexican cartels to smuggle weapons of mass destruction into the U.S.
